sentences.target: Der Gegenstand liegt unter dem Sofa.

translations.de: Der Gegenstand liegt unter dem Sofa.
translations.en: The object is under the sofa.
translations.es: La cosa está debajo del sofá.
translations.fr: Le truc est sous le canapé.
translations.it: La cosa è sotto il divano.
translations.pt: A coisa está embaixo do sofá.
translations.nl: Het ding ligt onder de bank.
translations.hu: A tárgy a kanapé alatt van.
translations.hi: वह चीज़ सोफ़े के नीचे है.
translations.el: Το πράγμα είναι κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.id: Benda itu ada di bawah sofa.
translations.ja: それはソファの下にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; agrees with the head noun 'Gegenstand' and marks it as the subject.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'liegt'. Refers to a physical item.
3rd person singular present of 'liegen'; intransitive stative verb indicating location; takes a locative prepositional phrase.
Preposition meaning 'under/beneath'; with a static location it governs the dative case.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; required by 'unter' for a static location; modifies 'Sofa'.
Neuter noun; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'unter'; locative complement.

sentences.target: Ich suche einen Gegenstand für das Regal.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈɡeːɡn̩ʃtant fyːɐ das ʁeˈɡaːl/

translations.de: Ich suche einen Gegenstand für das Regal.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈɡeːɡn̩ʃtant fyːɐ das ʁeˈɡaːl/
translations.en: I’m looking for an object for the shelf.
translations.fr: Je cherche quelque chose pour l’étagère.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找可以放在架子上的东西。
translations.yue: 我喺度搵啲擺喺層架嘅嘢。
translations.pt: Estou procurando algo para a prateleira.
translations.tr: Rafa koymak için bir şey arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm thứ gì đó để đặt lên kệ.
translations.nl: Ik zoek iets voor op de plank.
translations.hi: मैं शेल्फ के लिए कुछ ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter noe til hyllen.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari sesuatu untuk ditaruh di rak.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter något till hyllan.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter noget til hylden.
translations.ja: 棚に置くものを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'suche'.
1st person singular present of 'suchen'; transitive verb governing an accusative direct object and optionally a purpose PP.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object 'Gegenstand'.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'suche'.
Preposition meaning 'for'; governs the accusative case to indicate purpose or target.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular; required by 'für'; modifies 'Regal'.
Neuter noun; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für' indicating the intended place/purpose.

sentences.target: Dieser Gegenstand gehört nicht in den Müll.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzɐ ˈɡeːɡn̩ʃtant ɡəˈhøːɐt nɪçt ɪn deːn mʏl/

translations.de: Dieser Gegenstand gehört nicht in den Müll.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzɐ ˈɡeːɡn̩ʃtant ɡəˈhøːɐt nɪçt ɪn deːn mʏl/
translations.en: This object doesn’t belong in the trash.
translations.es: Esto no va a la basura.
translations.fr: Ça ne va pas à la poubelle.
translations.yue: 呢樣嘢唔可以掉落垃圾桶。
translations.pt: Isso não vai para o lixo.
translations.vi: Cái này không nên vứt vào thùng rác.
translations.ar: هذا لا يجب رميه في سلة المهملات.
translations.nl: Dit hoort niet in de prullenbak.
translations.uk: Це не можна викидати в смітник.
translations.hu: Ezt nem szabad a kukába dobni.
translations.hi: इसे कूड़ेदान में नहीं फेंकना चाहिए.
translations.pl: Tego nie wolno wyrzucać do kosza.
translations.el: Αυτό δεν πρέπει να πεταχτεί στα σκουπίδια.
translations.id: Ini tidak boleh dibuang ke tempat sampah.
translations.sv: Det här ska inte slängas i soporna.
translations.ro: Asta nu se aruncă la gunoi.
translations.da: Det her hører ikke til i skraldespanden.
translations.ja: これはゴミ箱に捨てるものじゃありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gegenstand' (subject).
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'gehört'.
3rd person singular present of 'gehören'; intransitive verb taking a prepositional complement to indicate appropriate place.
Negation particle; negates the predicate 'gehört ... in den Müll'.
Preposition; with accusative it expresses direction into a destination.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Müll' as required by directional 'in'.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'in' indicating destination.

sentences.target: Wir stellen den Gegenstand ins Regal.

translations.de: Wir stellen den Gegenstand ins Regal.
translations.en: We’re putting the object on the shelf.
translations.es: Vamos a poner esto en la repisa.
translations.fr: On met le truc sur l’étagère.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把东西放到架子上。
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את זה על המדף.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt món đồ lên kệ.
translations.nl: We zetten het ding op de plank.
translations.hi: हम उस चीज़ को शेल्फ पर रख रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami menaruh barang itu di rak.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of 'stellen'.
1st person plural present; transitive verb meaning to place/put (upright); selects an accusative direct object and a directional PP.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object 'Gegenstand'.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'stellen'.
Contraction of 'in das'; functions as a preposition indicating direction toward a goal; encodes the accusative article for the following neuter noun.
Neuter noun; accusative singular as the complement of the directional preposition 'ins'; indicates destination.
